notes: SHIP v1.14.265 - MIRROR FINISH (Ship 3 of the INSPECT-3D MIRROR port; other half of make-the-rack-more-real). Ports the mock setFinish(mirror) recipe from PHANTOM-SPARSE-RACK-MIRROR-v32 onto the rack STRUCTURE: black-lacquer piano mirror = color 0x04060a, metalness 1.0, roughness 0.05, envMapIntensity 0.25, emissive off. Applied to steelMat/CHROME (posts+rail bodies), sidePanelMat (the big flats - were matte 0.7/0.5), footMat. HONORS the .256 lock: STRUCTURE ONLY - trays keep their type colour, untouched. Also ported the mock buildEnvMirror as _envCubeMirror() and swapped scene.environment to it: a black studio room with white/cyan/violet light BANDS + a top softbox - ESSENTIAL because a roughness-0.05 metal reflecting the old dark gradient (_envCube) shows almost nothing (mock note verbatim). Registered via _tex() so bayDispose cleans it. LEFT alone (reported deviations from mock which mirrors everything): the semi-transparent emissive back panel (backMat - kept as depth/contrast) and the .260 perforated rail FACES (railFaceMat - kept machined-matte + preserve the .260 boundary); the ghost reflection clones rackGrp AFTER build so it inherits the mirror. Trays still catch the studio env faintly (env is global) - colour unchanged, only reflections, allowed. 5 edits in rackElevation_render3D. reh3d-only -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical; forge3d untouched. Gates: node --check 4/0; CSS balanced; NUL 0; ctrl unchanged; three-stamp .264->.265. NOT device-verified (cannot screenshot the live 3D) - John iPhone gate: does the rack read as polished black mirror, not too dark/dead; if flat, next lever is envMapIntensity up or brighter env bands (env is the mirror, not the material).
